hero.description: KETA.COMP crafts digital infrastructure that scales. From web platforms to AI systems — we engineer solutions that define entire industries.

about.heading: Engineering the
about.description1: KETA.COMP is not an agency. We are a future engineering collective — a tight-knit team of builders who obsess over systems thinking, elegant code, and technologies that last decades, not quarters.
about.description2: Founded in Uzbekistan, built for the world. Every line of code we write carries the ambition of creating the next generation of digital infrastructure across Central Asia and beyond.
about.description3: We don't build websites. We architect digital ecosystems that become the backbone of industries.
about.value1Desc: We see the full stack — from infrastructure to UX — as one interconnected system.
about.value2Desc: We build for what comes next, not just what exists today.
about.value3Desc: Mediocrity is not an option. Every pixel, every query, every API matters.

services.heading: Our
services.description: Six core disciplines. One integrated team. Infinite possibilities.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: High-performance web platforms built with Next.js, React, and modern edge infrastructure. From SaaS dashboards to e-commerce systems.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.description: Cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter that feel native on every device. Beautiful UX backed by robust APIs.

items.title: AI Solutions
items.description: Custom AI integrations, LLM-powered applications, computer vision systems, and intelligent automation pipelines.

items.title: Startup Engineering
items.description: End-to-end product development for startups — from zero to launch in weeks. MVP to scale without the bloat.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Business process automation that eliminates repetitive work. Custom bots, workflow orchestration, and data pipelines.

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure
items.description: Scalable, resilient infrastructure on AWS and Cloudflare. DevOps, CI/CD, containerization, and observability.

portfolio.heading: Case
portfolio.description: Real problems. Real solutions. Real impact.

items.name: TextileOps / FabriX
items.description: Full-stack ERP system for textile factories — inventory, production tracking, supplier management, and analytics in one unified platform.

items.name: Bozor-Bozor
items.description: Modern digital marketplace for Central Asian products — real-time listings, escrow payments, and vendor analytics.

items.name: KRGo
items.description: Real-time logistics platform with route optimization, driver tracking, and automated dispatch for regional delivery companies.

items.name: OpenLearn
items.description: Open-source learning management system with AI-powered personalized learning paths, video streaming, and certification.

items.name: Mahalla-Rabosi
items.description: Digital infrastructure for mahalla (neighborhood) governance — complaints, announcements, voting, and resource management.

items.name: AI Trading Analytics
items.description: ML-powered trading signal system with sentiment analysis, pattern recognition, and automated risk assessment for crypto markets.

items.description: Production-grade systems

items.title: Foundation
items.description: KETA.COMP founded. Core team assembled. First three enterprise projects launched. Infrastructure for Central Asian digital economy established.

items.title: Expansion
items.description: AI integration across all products. Mobile division launched. First regional partnerships signed. User base crosses 10K.

items.title: Enterprise Scale
items.description: Enterprise SaaS suite. Marketplace platform expansion. Dedicated AI lab. Series A fundraising. Team grows to 15+.

items.title: Global Ecosystem
items.description: KETA.COMP becomes the engineering backbone of Central Asian digital infrastructure. 100K+ users. Multi-country operations. IPO horizon.

team.heading: Meet the
team.description: A small but formidable team of engineers who believe code can change civilizations.

members.name: Miyras Xalmuratov
members.bio: Visionary engineer and systems architect. Building KETA.COMP to become the engineering backbone of Central Asia's digital future.

members.name: Engineering Team
members.bio: A growing team of passionate engineers building the future of digital infrastructure.

members.name: Design & UX
members.bio: Crafting interfaces that feel inevitable — beautiful, functional, and deeply considered.

investor.heading: A Once-in-a-Decade
investor.description: Central Asia's digital infrastructure is being built right now. KETA.COMP is positioned at the center of this transformation.
investor.marketDesc: $2.3B+ Central Asian digital economy growing 34% YoY
investor.tractionDesc: 10+ enterprise clients, 100K+ user vision, multi-country presence
investor.teamDesc: Engineers who've shipped production systems used by thousands
investor.visionDesc: The engineering backbone for Central Asia's digital renaissance
